comment: Performance baselines used by the macrobenchmark CI gate.
The canonical benchmark device is the GitHub Actions API 33 emulator
(google_apis, pixel_6 profile). Baselines must be seeded from that
device class via perf/check_baselines.py --rebaseline or the dedicated
workflow_dispatch path before PR verification can pass.
Re-baselining is an explicit commit to this file — see
Scroll/composer frame metrics are intentionally non-gating in startup-only v1;
track deterministic CI emulator coverage restoration in letta-mobile-4ccv.

notes: API 33 sidesteps the Android 11 / API 30 profileinstaller handshake bug tracked in letta-mobile-ce2c.
A physical-device slow-floor tier can be added later without changing this gate's source of truth.
Startup-only CI gate v1. FrameTimingMetric benchmarks stay non-gating until the app exposes a deterministic benchmark launch surface on the canonical emulator (letta-mobile-4ccv).
